mapper.select:
select r.record_id, r.activity_id, r.voter_id, r.candidate_id, r.option_id, r.create_time, v.voter_name, c.name as candidate_name, o.name as option_name from vote_record r left join vote_voter v on r.voter_id = v.voter_id left join vote_candidate c on r.candidate_id = c.candidate_id left join vote_option o on r.option_id = o.option_id
and r.activity_id = #{activityId} and r.candidate_id = #{candidateId} and r.option_id = #{optionId} and v.voter_name like concat('%', #{voterName}, '%')
order by r.record_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into vote_record (activity_id, voter_id, candidate_id, option_id, create_time) values (#{activityId}, #{voterId}, #{candidateId}, #{optionId}, sysdate())

insert into vote_record (activity_id, voter_id, candidate_id, option_id, create_time) values
(#{item.activityId}, #{item.voterId}, #{item.candidateId}, #{item.optionId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from vote_record where record_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select candidate_id as candidateId, option_id as optionId, count(1) as votes from vote_record where activity_id = #{activityId} group by candidate_id, option_id
select count(1) from vote_record where activity_id = #{activityId}
